title: Bernie Sanders - Request (Feel the Bern!!!=I like Bernie Sanders)

enrichment.summary: Kyle endorses Bernie Sanders for president, arguing he has a genuine record of caring for ordinary people unlike Hillary Clinton or Republicans. He discusses whether Congress would block Sanders' agenda (yes, at first, but predicts eventual populist backlash), whether Sanders could be assassinated for challenging the status quo (unlikely unless he opposes military interventions), and compares him favorably to Obama while critiquing Hillary's use of gender identity politics.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Should be next president; has a genuine record and doesn't take donor money
Disqualified by taking Wall Street speaking fees; using gender as a substitute for a good record
A Jewish president would be more historically significant given anti-Semitism's deeper history than anti-womanism
Congress will block him initially but will get voted out as public opinion shifts
Works fine — European socialist countries are better off than the US; Fox News critics are uneducated on the topic
Only real risk would be if he refused military deployments; unlikely because power elite fears getting caught
Too timid and 'Uncle Tom'; still blocked by Republicans despite being politically moderate
A fascist who manipulates people and exploits eminent domain to benefit elites
Idea is somewhat sloppy but fundable if military spending is redirected
